name: Elastic Path
description: Elastic Path — Composable commerce API platform with catalog, promotions, and cart management for enterprise omnichannel.

seo.title: Elastic Path — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Elastic Path: Elastic Path — Composable commerce API platform with catalog, promotions, and cart management for enterprise omnichannel.

when_to_use: Enterprise composable commerce API for omnichannel retail
Custom product catalog and pricing for B2B and B2C channels
Cart and promotion APIs for headless storefronts at scale
Multi-market and multi-currency pricing management via API
Composable e-commerce replacing monolithic OCC/Hybris platforms

pros: Strong B2B and B2C catalog features
review.verdict: One of the most credible composable commerce APIs at enterprise scale, but priced accordingly.
review.best_for: Enterprise retailers unifying B2B and B2C on a headless stack
review.not_for: SMB merchants who'd be better on Shopify or BigCommerce

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
